course.title: Learn English with Minecraft Hardcore LIVE - Exploring Biomes
course.description: Learn English with Minecraft — Episode 3. 5 curated listening segments with cloze quizzes.

lesson.transcript_zh: 在这个探索生物群系的直播中，玩家四处探索不同的地形。他先收集了浮上来的煤炭，然后放置火把继续前进。他整理物品，扔掉不需要的，留下很多烤鱼。他提到想找到一片淡橡木森林，这是他从未见过的新生物群系。最后他回到家附近，有观众问他是否要建红石装置。

segments.sentence_en: Look at all that coal. Okay, let's continue. I'm going to place my boat again. Place my boat.

segments.sentence_en: I throw away? There we go. A lot of cooked fish. I'll leave these potatoes. There's a I don't need this copper.

segments.sentence_zh: 这个，但我从没见过淡橡木 __BLANK__。所以我想去找找。

segments.sentence_en: I think my house is close by. Are you going to build a redstone house, I'll get a drink of my soda.

question.prompt: What biome did the player want to find that they had never seen?
